record.text: <s>[INST] Def: गिष्णु [/INST] "गिष्णु" Def: m. m. (= गेष्° ), a professional singer, [Uṇ.] k. a chanter of the [SV.] ; ib. an actor, [W.]. Tags: Masculine. Citations: Uṇādi-sūtra [Uṇ], सामवेद [SV], Works of Horace H. Wilson [W]. </s>
